description: A developer deployed a new 'analytics-dashboard' microservice in the 'dashboard-prod' namespace, but it is immediately crash-looping. Repair the 'analytics-dashboard' Deployment by mounting the 'nginx.conf' ConfigMap to '/etc/nginx/nginx.conf' using a subPath to prevent directory overwriting, injecting all keys from the 'db-credentials' Secret as environment variables via envFrom, and projecting pod labels and annotations to '/etc/podinfo/labels.txt' and '/etc/podinfo/annotations.txt' using the downwardAPI. Ensure the pods reach a healthy 'Running' state. Login to Rancher at https://localhost with credentials admin / Admin12345678!
